retrieved_result: Why does anal sex hurt? Anal sex, or any type of sex for that matter, isn't going to be the bee's knees for everybody. Even if one sexual activity feels good, that's no guarantee that every type of sex is going to feel good either. It may just be that anal sex is not really your thing, and that's okay.
